The '''''Lion''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Along with the [[Lance (Nebulon-B2 frigate)|''Lance'']] and the ''[[Ornik]]'', the ''Lion'' was to commence an attack on the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Conqueror (Imperial-class)|''Conqueror'']]. They had [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]], [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]] and [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] as fighter support and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] as back-up. The ''Conqueror'' had [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] from [[Avenger Squadron]], [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]].

==Behind the scenes==
While the outcome depends on the player's decision it cannot be [[canon]] for the ''Conqueror'' to be destroyed as it appears in another battle and is destroyed there.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
